description: Case style: Analog watch with a rectangular stainless steel case Dial style: Maroon dial with silver hands Strap style:Maroon glossy strap has a tang clasp with a fixed loop for a custom fit Features:Branding at the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistant 30 m Comes in a signature Fastrack caseWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
